title: HTML Templates Quiz
description: Test your knowledge of the essential tags and methods for creating and using reusable HTML components.

questions.question: Which tag is used to hold client-side content that you do NOT want to be rendered when the page loads?
What is the primary benefit of the <template> tag compared to a <div style='display: none'>?
options: The template's content is processed and images are downloaded immediately.
The template's content is not part of the active document and scripts inside it are not executed until it is cloned.
The template tag is only used for search engines to read.
The template tag automatically styles itself.

questions.question: In JavaScript, which property of a template object contains the template's actual content that you want to clone?
Which method should you use on a template's content to create a deep copy for insertion into the page?
Which tag is used WITHIN a template to define a custom content entry point for web components?
